cit.basis: Flat 20% Tax on Income (ToI) for medium and large taxpayers under the Law on Taxation (2023), administered by the General Department of Taxation (GDT).
cit.note: Small taxpayers use progressive 0-20% brackets on annual profit (KHR-denominated: 0% up to KHR 16M, 20% above KHR 102M); this SME estimator keeps the flat 20%/30% model. Insurance companies pay 5% on gross premiums for insurance activities (out of scope).
cit.qip_note: Qualified Investment Projects (QIPs) approved by the Council for the Development of Cambodia receive ToI exemption periods of 3 to 9 years under the Law on Investment; not modelled by this estimator.

minimum_tax.note: Minimum tax of 1% of annual turnover (inclusive of all taxes except VAT) applies unless the taxpayer maintains proper accounting records.

prepayment_of_toi.note: Monthly prepayment of ToI of 1% of turnover, creditable against the annual ToI (or minimum tax) liability.

vat.note: 10% VAT on taxable supplies; 0% on exports.

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; jurisdiction fiscal calendars and transitional periods may differ.

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are simplified for LedgerField estimates.
Small-taxpayer brackets, QIP incentives, minimum tax, prepayments, WHT, relief, filing, and sector-specific rules may alter outcomes.
Verify against official guidance and local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode every deduction, exemption, treaty, WHT, payroll, or filing rule.
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.
